category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a chess engine; official README describes Stockfish as a free and strong UCI chess engine.
display_name_sources: Official website and GitHub organization use Stockfish capitalization.
docs_sources: Official Stockfish docs site is dedicated documentation; official README links to Stockfish documentation for usage help.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/official-stockfish/Stockfish; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify a UCI chess engine distributed as the stockfish executable.
